recommendations.title: My Best Friend

recommendations.title: Haute Cuisine
recommendations.overview: The story of Danièle Delpeuch and how she was appointed as the private chef for François Mitterrand.

recommendations.title: Both Sides of the Blade
recommendations.overview: Jean and Sara have been living together for 10 years. When they first met, Sara was living with François, Jean’s best friend and an admirer from back when he played rugby. Jean and Sara love each other. One day, Sara sees François in the street. He d

recommendations.title: The Class
recommendations.overview: Teacher and novelist François Bégaudeau plays a version of himself as he negotiates a year with his racially mixed students from a tough Parisian neighborhood.

recommendations.title: Anthony Zimmer
recommendations.overview: François, an ordinary Joe, falls hard for the sublimely beautiful woman who has just picked him up on the train and invited him to spend the weekend with her on the Riviera. But when the lady disappears the next morning and the police drag him in for

recommendations.title: The Jackpot!
recommendations.overview: To his family, François Voisin is nothing more than a humdrum civil servant. In truth, for the past twenty years he has been working as a secret agent. All goes well until circumstances put his secret in danger.

recommendations.title: School Is Over
recommendations.overview: Agathe Langlois, Parisian until the end of the nails well varnishes, is delighted: she is going to be confirmed as a professor of English. The happiness of the good news will not last as she learns that she is deployed to the countryside.

recommendations.title: Presidents
recommendations.overview: A former french President, Nicolas, decides to persuade another one, François, to campaign together in order to return to the front stage of politics.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Determined teen Din is longing to reconnect with his childhood best friend when he meets a wish-granting dragon who shows him the magic of possibilities.

recommendations.title: Happiness
